heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 21108 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21108(a)36:2408(e)., , §§ 8(e), 15 (1st sentence), , 239.June 12, 1984Pub. L. 98–31498 Stat. 23821108(b)36:2414 (1st sentence).In subsection (a), the words “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary. The words “each State” are substituted for “State or States” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21108(a)36:2408(e)., , §§ 8(e), 15 (1st sentence), , 239.June 12, 1984Pub. L. 98–31498 Stat. 23821108(b)36:2414 (1st sentence).In subsection (a), the words “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary. The words “each State” are substituted for “State or States” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of each State in which it is incorporated.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
